# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

Prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Service Principal for CI/CD pipeline
  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: production
    allowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    metadata:
      description: Environment for the deployment
  resourceGroupScope:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Resource group name to scope permissions
  allowedLocations:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - eastus
      - westus
      - northeurope
    metadata:
      description: Allowed Azure regions for resource deployment
  allowedResourceTypes:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
      - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      - Microsoft.Web/sites
      - Microsoft.Sql/servers
      - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      - Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries
      - Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    metadata:
      description: Allowed resource types for deployment
  enableAuditLogging:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable audit logging for Service Principal activities
variables:
  customRoleName: "[concat('CICD-Limited-Deployer-', parameters('environment'))]"
  roleDefinitionId: "[guid(subscription().subscriptionId, variables('customRoleName'))]"
  resourceGroupId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups', parameters('resourceGroupScope'))]"
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[variables('roleDefinitionId')]"
    properties:
      roleName: "[variables('customRoleName')]"
      description: Custom role for CI/CD pipeline with least privilege access scoped to specific resource group and resource types
      type: CustomRole
      permissions:
        - actions:
            - Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions/resourceGroups/read
            - Microsoft.Resources/deployments/*
            - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/read
            - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/write
            - Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/delete
            - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/read
            - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/write
            - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/delete
            - Microsoft.Web/sites/read
            - Microsoft.Web/sites/write
            - Microsoft.Web/sites/delete
            - Microsoft.Sql/servers/read
            - Microsoft.Sql/servers/write
            - Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/read
            - Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/write
            - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/read
            - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/write
            - Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/delete
            - Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/read
            - Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries/write
            - Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/read
            - Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/write
            - Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings/*
          notActions:
            - Microsoft.Authorization/*/write
            - Microsoft.Authorization/*/delete
            - Microsoft.Authorization/elevateAccess/action
            - Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/write
            - Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/delete
            - Microsoft.Compute/galleries/share/action
          dataActions: []
          notDataActions: []
      assignableScopes:
        - "[variables('resourceGroupId')]"
  - type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
    apiVersion: 2023-01-31
    name: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: cicd-pipeline
      managedBy: infrastructure-team
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2022-04-01
    name: "[guid(variables('resourceGroupId'), variables('roleDefinitionId'), parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[variables('roleDefinitionId')]"
      - "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('roleDefinitionId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(parameters('servicePrincipalName')).principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      scope: "[variables('resourceGroupId')]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments
    apiVersion: 2023-04-01
    name: "[concat('location-restriction-', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    properties:
      displayName: Restrict deployment locations for CI/CD pipeline
      description: Ensures resources are only deployed to approved Azure regions
      policyDefinitionId: /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions/e56962a6-4747-49cd-b67b-bf8b01975c4c
      scope: "[variables('resourceGroupId')]"
      parameters:
        listOfAllowedLocations:
          value: "[parameters('allowedLocations')]"
      enforcementMode: Default
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments
    apiVersion: 2023-04-01
    name: "[concat('resource-type-restriction-', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    properties:
      displayName: Restrict allowed resource types for CI/CD pipeline
      description: Ensures only approved resource types can be deployed
      policyDefinitionId: /providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions/a08ec900-254a-4555-9bf5-e42af04b5c5c
      scope: "[variables('resourceGroupId')]"
      parameters:
        listOfResourceTypesAllowed:
          value: "[parameters('allowedResourceTypes')]"
      enforcementMode: Default
  - type: Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: 2021-05-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('servicePrincipalName'), '-diagnostics')]"
    condition: "[parameters('enableAuditLogging')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    scope: "[concat('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/', parameters('servicePrincipalName'))]"
    properties:
      logs:
        - category: AuditEvent
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
      metrics:
        - category: AllMetrics
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
outputs:
  servicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(parameters('servicePrincipalName')).principalId]"
  servicePrincipalClientId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(parameters('servicePrincipalName')).clientId]"
  customRoleId:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('roleDefinitionId')]"
  scope:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('resourceGroupId')]"
